title: Sculk Vial
description: Adds a Skulk Vial where you can store and receive experience
body:
## Craft
![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f368e742f737692c09cdc8a49a7a8cd420cb7d15.png)
## Store and Recive XP
To store XP, you need to sneak and right click
![Store](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fHPRY7p6/images/84fcde85952e3e32ef1a2248c0d65250b582adc2.gif)

To recive XP, you need to right click
![Recive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fHPRY7p6/images/559213851b1d505f71b4fb328c6910906f3856b3.gif)

### Credit
Texture and mechanics from Jet's Better Exploration mod
